question: Will Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' exceed 20,000 words in its official English translation?
reason: Pope Leo XIV's encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' is reported to be approximately 43,000 words long.
evidence: Axios reports the encyclical spans 43,000 words. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/25/pope-leo-xiv-ai-humanity-war-jobs-warning?utm_source=openai))
The Atlantic notes the encyclical is 43,000 words long. ([theatlantic.com](https://www.theatlantic.com/ideas/2026/05/pope-leo-ai-encyclical-magnifica-humanitas/687294/?utm_source=openai))

Le Monde states the encyclical is 39,000 words long. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/religions/article/2026/05/26/with-his-encyclical-leo-xiv-does-not-simply-proclaim-that-another-world-is-possible-he-calls-on-us-to-build-that-other-world_6753818_63.html?utm_source=openai))
